title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents fail because errors compound rapidly across multi-step workflows. He contends that the agent industry has normalized unreliability and that reliability and careful validation through dogfooding matter more than raw performance or code quality.
